case_title: S AND C MOTORS INC VS RALSTON S (SHAUN) G.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $678.21 FILED BY S AND C MOTORS INC AS TO DEFENDANT RALSTON S (SHAUN) G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RALSTON S (SHAUN) G.
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO SHAUN G. RALSTON, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-20-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-14-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S AND C MOTORS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RALSTON S (SHAUN) G. $678.21 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $724.21 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEFT. RETURNED.
